subject: Password reset not working
body: Hi team, I tried resetting my password three times but I am still unable to log in to my account. Please help.

subject: Charged twice for one order
body: I placed one order yesterday but my card has been charged twice. Please resolve this issue as soon as possible.

subject: Order not delivered and no updates
body: My order was supposed to arrive four days ago and I have not received any tracking updates. This is very frustrating.

subject: Need invoice copy
body: Hello, I need a copy of my invoice for last month's purchase for reimbursement purposes.

subject: App crashes during checkout
body: Every time I try to complete payment, the app crashes on the checkout page. I am using the latest version.

subject: Account locked after suspicious login alert
body: I received a suspicious login alert and now my account is locked. I have urgent work pending and need immediate access.
